who: procurement officers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 contracts/month
offer: For procurement officers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 contracts/month, inefficient contract management causes missed renewal deadlines. We automate contract renewals instead of manual tracking of contract dates and supplier information.
problem: inefficient contract management and renewal processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement officers

Community forums for procurement tools discussion
try_it: Let users try dashboard for supplier info on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
